AEP-001 public demo · proof before propagation

A model can answer.
An institution must prove.

This browser-local simulator turns the GoalOS constitution into a public workbench. Pick a scenario, tune the hard gates, inspect the protocol objects, and see whether the work can publish, canary, roll back, quarantine, or return to proof.

Public-safe simulation only. No account, no form, no wallet, no transaction, no analytics, no cookies, no user data wanted.

Aim
GoalOSCommit
Act
RunCommitment
Prove
ProofPacket
Evolve
SelectionCertificate
NO PROOF
NO EVOLUTION
Aim

Objective, authority, risk, constraints, evaluators, rollback obligations.

Act

Bounded execution, role contracts, tool permissions, runtime limits.

Prove

Trace roots, output hashes, eval attestations, costs, safety, signatures.

Evolve

Selection certificate, canary, challenge, rollback, Chronicle handoff.

Scenario

Score
—
Level
—
Failures
—
Constitutional verdict
